snippet.title: Nagabandham Official Trailer | Virat Karrna | Nabha Natesh | Abhishek Nama | Abhishek Pictures
snippet.description:
Nagabandham Official Trailer on @AbhishekPicturesOfficial and @nikstudiosindia   

Nagabandham is an 2026 Upcoming Pan India Movie Starring Virat Karrna, Nabha Natesh, Ishwarya Menon, Mahesh Manjrekar, Jagapathi Babu & others. Story, Screenplay & Direction by Abhishek Nama. Presented by Lakshmi Ira & Devansh Nama and Produced by Kishore Annapureddy, Nishitha Nagireddy under NIK Studios & Abhishek Pictures.

In Cinemas Worldwide from 3rd July, 2026.

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of ‚ÄúALPHA‚ÄĚ

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

‚Ėļ Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY ūüĒĒ Stay updated!
‚Ėļ YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

‚Ėļ Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema‚Äôs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: 10 Worst Bollywood Trailers That Killed Movies Before Their Release
snippet.description:
With everything that has dropped regarding people's thoughts on #alpha starring #aliabhatt , I really wanted to focus on #bollywood trailers that could not create an impression at all and actually being key contributing factors in killing hype. This includes #salmankhan in Sikandar, #aamirkhan in Laal Singh Chaddha, #hrithikroshan in Fighter and of course the infamous #adipurush . I hope you like the vide on:-

snippet.title: KLARA AND THE SUN ‚Äď Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Meet Klara. Your new best (artificial) friend. ūüĆě

Jenna Ortega is Klara in Director Taika Waititi‚Äôs adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro‚Äôs #KlaraAndTheSun - coming exclusively to theatres October 23. Watch the trailer now.

KLARA AND THE SUN

Comedy/Drama

October 23, 2026
Based on the bestselling novel from Nobel Prize-winner Kazuo Ishiguro and written and directed by Academy-Award¬ģ winner Taika Waititi (Jojo Rabbit), Klara and the Sun introduces audiences to Klara (Jenna Ortega), an Artificial Friend who wants nothing more than to find the perfect home. When Klara meets Josie (Mia Tharia), each immediately senses a kindred spirit in the other. Josie has a fraught relationship with her mother (Amy Adams) and they‚Äôve suffered great loss, but Klara‚Äôs innocent wonder and unwavering loyalty begin to heal the family and bring light to Josie‚Äôs complicated world.

snippet.title: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai | Udit Narayan | Alka Yagnik | Andaaz (2003)
snippet.description:
Fall in love with the timeless melody "Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

localized.title: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai | Udit Narayan | Alka Yagnik | Andaaz (2003)
localized.description:
Fall in love with the timeless melody "Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

Vishwanath & Sons is an upcoming Tamil-Telugu film, starring Suriya, Mamitha Baiju, Radhika Sarathkumar, and Raveena Tandon in pivotal roles. Directed by Venky Atluri, the film is produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi and Sai Soujanya under Sithara Entertainments and Fortune Four Cinemas, and presented by Srikara Studios.

Featuring music by G. V. Prakash Kumar, cinematography by Nimish Ravi, editing by Navin Nooli, and production design by Banglan.

snippet.description:
THE GRAND FINALS OF FFMAI 2026 SUMMER IS HERE!
After a gruelling Main Event stage, 12 teams have qualified for the GRAND FINALS, which will be played in CHAMPION RUSH format!

The Top 12 finalists-
‚ô¶ Revenant XSpark
‚ô¶ Team Apex Gaming
‚ô¶ S8UL Esports
‚ô¶ All Gamers Global
‚ô¶ Team Falcons
‚ô¶ RRQ Kazu
‚ô¶ Bigetron By Vitality
‚ô¶ Aurora Gaming
‚ô¶ Hotshot Esports
‚ô¶ Titan Esports Club
‚ô¶ Straw Hats
‚ô¶ DEMONS PRIDE

Champion Rush format-
Any team that reaches 90 points will activate Champion Rush.
The team to win a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will be crowned CHAMPIONS!

Schedule ūüďč
ūüďÖ Grand Finals - June 21

Are you ready to witness the champion, who will be CROWNED BY FIRE!

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #crownedbyfire

#KandaangiKandaangi #Jilla #ThalapathyVijay #Vijay #KajalAggarwal #DImman #ShreyaGhoshal #Vairamuthu #StarMusic 
Watch the evergreen romantic hit ‚ÄúKandaangi Kandaangi‚ÄĚ from the blockbuster movie Jilla, featuring Thalapathy Vijay and Kajal Aggarwal. Composed by D. Imman, this soulful Tamil melody beautifully captures the warmth, love, and emotions of a heartfelt relationship.

Song Details:

Bhul gaya raah nindran nu meri akh da, 
Kakh da reha ni dil, hunda si jo lakh da.
Bhul gaya raah nindran nu meri akh da, 
Kakh da reha ni dil, hunda si jo lakh da.
Chain udd da udd da jaave, 
Udd da udd da jaave. 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Mehak hawawan vichon aave, 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya?
Haye ve haye sajna, Tere hum saaye sajna. Tere aa ve kahnu kakhan vich rolle? 
Tu taa sahan vich bole meriyaan ve, 
meriyaan ve

Te ballan vich taare. 
Jine vi farishte rabb de, 
Ohde sake sabandhi saare.
Ohde maathe chanda chamkda, 
Te julfan de vich taare. 
Jine vi farishte rabb de, 
Ohde sake sabandhi saare.
Naa pive naa khave,

Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Kayanaat ch vakhri lor ae, 
Mere dil vich sundaa shor ae. 
Mera sohna sohna rahega nahi, 
Ohde warga hor ae.
Dil jis val khichda jaave, 
Jis val khichda jaave. 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Mehak hawawan vichon aave, 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya?
Haye ve haye sajna, 
Tere hum saaye sajna.
Tere aa ve kahnu kakhan vich rolle? 
Tu tan sahan vich bole meriyaan ve.

snippet.title: Ek Aakhri Mulakat ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Ek Aakhri Mulakat ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Ek aakhri mulakat...
bas itni si khwahish baaki hai.

Na koi shikayat karni hai...
na koi gila kehna hai...
bas ek baar tujhe dekh kar
khamosh ho jana hai.

Mohabbat adhuri sahi...
par ehsaas aaj bhi wahi hai.

Jo baatein kabhi keh na sake...
wo aankhon se keh denge...
agar ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye.

‚ÄúEk Aakhri Mulakat‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo bichhadne ke baad bhi
sirf ek mulaqat ka intezar karta raha.

Waqt badal gaya...
raaste badal gaye...
magar dil ki khwahish
aaj bhi wahi hai.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
intezar bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye...
phir shayad sukoon mil jaaye...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur usse ek baar phir dekhne ki tamanna rakhi ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

ūüéôÔłŹ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
ūüéß Vibe: Emotional ‚ÄĘ Deep ‚ÄĘ Heartbreak ‚ÄĘ Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

en-IN.title: Ek Aakhri Mulakat ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
en-IN.description:
Ek Aakhri Mulakat ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Ek aakhri mulakat...
bas itni si khwahish baaki hai.

Na koi shikayat karni hai...
na koi gila kehna hai...
bas ek baar tujhe dekh kar
khamosh ho jana hai.

Mohabbat adhuri sahi...
par ehsaas aaj bhi wahi hai.

Jo baatein kabhi keh na sake...
wo aankhon se keh denge...
agar ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye.

‚ÄúEk Aakhri Mulakat‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo bichhadne ke baad bhi
sirf ek mulaqat ka intezar karta raha.

Waqt badal gaya...
raaste badal gaye...
magar dil ki khwahish
aaj bhi wahi hai.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
intezar bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye...
phir shayad sukoon mil jaaye...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur usse ek baar phir dekhne ki tamanna rakhi ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

Lyrics:

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe

Choli Ke Peechhe

Chunari Ke Niche

Yeh Dil Mein Dungi Mere Yar Ko, Pyar Ko
Aah Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶

Aashiq Purane Tere, Aashiq Purane

Kya Karu Kya Karu

Ahanga Hai Mahanga
